scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @alphapane/shared && npm run build --workspace @alphapane/server && npm run build --workspace @alphapane/client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @alphapane/server" "npm run dev --workspace @alphapane/client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @alphapane/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @alphapane/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @alphapane/client
scripts.refresh:financials: npm run build --workspace @alphapane/shared && npm run refresh:financials --workspace @alphapane/server
scripts.refresh:prices: npm run build --workspace @alphapane/shared && npm run refresh:prices --workspace @alphapane/server
scripts.backfill:fallbacks: npm run build --workspace @alphapane/shared && npm run backfill:fallbacks --workspace @alphapane/server
